FOR SHURVEERS

Government Schemes & Programs

Free government programs every disciplined youth should know about

PM Yuva 2.0

Government entrepreneurship program for youth under 30

Visit Website

Skill India Mission

Free skill certification across 30+ sectors

Visit Website

NYKS Youth Programs

Government youth engagement and employment schemes

Visit Website

National Apprenticeship Scheme

Paid apprenticeships with registered companies across India

Visit Website

Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana

Free vocational training and certification programs

Visit Website

Startup India for Youth

Registration benefits and seed fund for young entrepreneurs

Visit Website

LATEST

News & Updates

Stay updated on NBF Connect launches and opportunities

LAUNCH May 2026

NBF Connect Youth Registration Now Open

Shurveers from NCC, NSS, Scouts and NYKS can now register on the platform.

Read More
PARTNER May 2026

First Partner Partner Onboarded in Hyderabad

NBF Connect signs its first pilot partner partnership in Telangana.

Read More
UPDATE May 2026

Resources Page Live with Free Career Tools

Resume templates, interview guides and government links now available.

Read More

Newsletter

NBF = National Bharat Force — India's disciplined youth force comprising NCC, NSS, Scouts & Guides, NYKS and Civil Defence members.

NBF Connect is an independent youth empowerment platform operated by National Bharat Force Connect. Not affiliated with or endorsed by any government ministry, bank, or financial institution.
